ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "day" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the sample was collected */,
  "sample_depth" TEXT /* Depth of the sample (e.g., Bottom, Middle, Surface) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sampling point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sampling point */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the sample in meters */,
  "survey_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the survey point */,
  "survey_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the survey point */,
  "survey_distance_m" REAL /* Distance of the survey point from the reference point */,
  "survey_depth_m" REAL /* Depth of the survey point in meters */,
  "survey_depth_bin" TEXT /* Depth bin of the survey point */,
  "sample_time" TEXT /* Time of the day when the sample was collected */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Name of the person who collected the sample */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the person who collected the sample */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of the site */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  "site_elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site in meters */,
  "site_area" REAL /* Area of the site in square meters */,
  "site_image" TEXT /* Path to an image of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the water in degrees Celsius */,
  "conductivity" REAL /* Conductivity of the water in S/m */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Salinity of the water in PSU */,
  "chlorophyll_volts" REAL /* Chlorophyll measurement in volts */,
  "chlorophyll_ug_l" REAL /* Chlorophyll concentration in ug/l */,
  "turbidity_volts" REAL /* Turbidity measurement in volts */,
  "turbidity_ntu" REAL /* Turbidity measurement in NTU */,
  "flntu_turbidity_raw" REAL /* Raw turbidity measurement from FLNTU sensor */,
  "flntu_chlorophyll_raw" REAL /* Raw chlorophyll measurement from FLNTU sensor */,
  "flntu_fdom_raw" REAL /* Raw fDOM measurement from FLNTU sensor */,
  "flntu_fdom_ppb" REAL /* fDOM concentration in ppb */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the day when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the measurement */,
  "measurement_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty of the measurement */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used for measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_measurements_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_data" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the water in degrees Celsius */,
  "conductivity" REAL /* Conductivity of the water in S/m */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Salinity of the water in PSU */,
  "turbidity_ntu" REAL /* Turbidity measurement in NTU */,
  "chlorophyll_ug_l" REAL /* Chlorophyll concentration in ug/l */,
  "o2_saturation" REAL /* Oxygen saturation in percent */,
  "o2_mg_l" REAL /* Oxygen concentration in mg/l */,
  "visible_humic_like" REAL /* Visible humic-like substance concentration */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall in millimeters */,
  "rainfall_5_day" REAL /* Rainfall over the last 5 days in millimeters */,
  "air_temp_ave" REAL /* Average air temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "air_temp_max" REAL /* Maximum air temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "discharge" REAL /* Discharge in cubic meters per second */,
  "vvh_a" REAL /* Visible visible humic-like substance concentration */,
  "survey_time" TEXT /* Time of the day when the survey was conducted */,
  "survey_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the survey data */,
  "survey_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty of the survey data */,
  "survey_method" TEXT /* Method used for the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_data_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* User who created the version */,
  "version_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the version change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_versions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was added */,
  "note_by" TEXT /* User who added the note */,
  "note_edit_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was last edited */,
  "note_edit_by" TEXT /* User who last edited the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_notes_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental factor */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Rainfall in millimeters */,
  "rainfall_5_day" REAL /* Rainfall over the last 5 days in millimeters */,
  "air_temp_ave" REAL /* Average air temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "air_temp_max" REAL /* Maximum air temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "discharge" REAL /* Discharge in cubic meters per second */,
  "vvh_a" REAL /* Visible visible humic-like substance concentration */,
  "factor_time" TEXT /* Time of the day when the environmental factors were recorded */,
  "factor_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the environmental factors */,
  "factor_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty of the environmental factors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_factors_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., raw data, report) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file to ensure integrity */,
  "file_metadata" TEXT /* Metadata associated with the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_files_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_chemicals" (
  "chemical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical analysis */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample */,
  "chemical_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical */,
  "chemical_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the chemical */,
  "chemical_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the chemical */,
  "chemical_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the chemical */,
  "chemical_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty of the chemical measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chemical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_chemicals_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_biologicals" (
  "biological_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biological analysis */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample */,
  "biological_name" TEXT /* Name of the biological entity */,
  "biological_count" INTEGER /* Count of the biological entity */,
  "biological_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the biological entity */,
  "biological_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the biological entity */,
  "biological_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty of the biological measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("biological_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_biologicals_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_physicals" (
  "physical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each physical analysis */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample */,
  "physical_name" TEXT /* Name of the physical parameter */,
  "physical_measurement" REAL /* Measurement of the physical parameter */,
  "physical_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the physical parameter */,
  "physical_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the physical parameter */,
  "physical_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty of the physical measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("physical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_physicals_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "method_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the method */,
  "method_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_methods_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_equipments" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "equipment_serial" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "equipment_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "equipment_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_equipments_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_qc" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control data point */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample */,
  "qc_parameter" TEXT /* Name of the quality control parameter */,
  "qc_value" REAL /* Value of the quality control parameter */,
  "qc_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the quality control parameter */,
  "qc_method" TEXT /* Method used for quality control */,
  "qc_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the quality control data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_qc_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)
